```r
file_path <- \../Data/ER_opioid_2016_2019_cleaned.csv\
if (!file.exists(file_path)) {
  stop(\File not found: Data/ER_opioid_2016_2019_cleaned.csv\)
}
er_data <- read_csv(file_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Keep a subset of North / Central AL (as in your script)
keep_cnty <- toupper(c(
  \Lauderdale\,\Limestone\,\Madison\,\Jackson\,\Colbert\,\Franklin\,
  \Lawrence\,\Morgan\,\Marshall\,\Dekalb\,\Marion\,\Winston\,
  \Cullman\,\Blount\,\Etowah\,\Cherokee\,\Lamar\,\Fayette\,
  \Walker\,\Jefferson\,\St. Clair\,\Pickens\,\Tuscaloosa\,\Shelby\
))

er_data <- er_data |>
  mutate(County = toupper(County),
         Date = as.Date(Date)) |>
  filter(County %in% keep_cnty)


# Read Data_ARCOS and clean for next process
Data_ARCOS <- read_csv(\../BigData/ARCOS_AL_2016_2019_cleaned.csv\)

Data_ARCOS_filted <- Data_ARCOS%>%
  filter(drug %in% c(\OXYCODONE\, \HYDROCODONE\, \BUPRENORPHINE\, \METHADONE\))%>%
  filter(county %in% toupper(c(
    \Lauderdale\, \Limestone\, \Madison\, \Jackson\, \Colbert\, \Franklin\,
    \Lawrence\, \Morgan\, \Marshall\, \Dekalb\, \Marion\, \Winston\,
    \Cullman\, \Blount\, \Etowah\, \Cherokee\, \Lamar\, \Fayette\,
    \Walker\, \Jefferson\, \St. Clair\, \Pickens\, \Tuscaloosa\, \Shelby\
  ))
  )%>%
  #mutate(mme = mme/1000000)%>%
  mutate(Date = mdy(date))%>%
  mutate(County = toupper(county))

arcos_wide_mme <- Data_ARCOS_filted %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols    = c(County, Date),
    names_from = drug,
    values_from= mme,
    values_fill = 0
  )

df_er_drug <- left_join(
  er_data,
  arcos_wide_mme,
  by = c(\County\, \Date\)
)

```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->
```r
file_path <- \../Data/ER_opioid_2016_2019_cleaned.csv\
if (!file.exists(file_path)) {
  stop(\File not found: Data/ER_opioid_2016_2019_cleaned.csv\)
}
er_data <- read_csv(file_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Keep a subset of North / Central AL (as in your script)
keep_cnty <- toupper(c(
  \Lauderdale\,\Limestone\,\Madison\,\Jackson\,\Colbert\,\Franklin\,
  \Lawrence\,\Morgan\,\Marshall\,\Dekalb\,\Marion\,\Winston\,
  \Cullman\,\Blount\,\Etowah\,\Cherokee\,\Lamar\,\Fayette\,
  \Walker\,\Jefferson\,\St. Clair\,\Pickens\,\Tuscaloosa\,\Shelby\
))

er_data <- er_data |>
  mutate(County = toupper(County),
         Date = as.Date(Date)) |>
  filter(County %in% keep_cnty)


# Read Data_ARCOS and clean for next process
Data_ARCOS <- read_csv(\../BigData/ARCOS_AL_2016_2019_cleaned.csv\)

Data_ARCOS_filted <- Data_ARCOS%>%
  filter(drug %in% c(\OXYCODONE\, \HYDROCODONE\, \BUPRENORPHINE\, \METHADONE\))%>%
  filter(county %in% toupper(c(
    \Lauderdale\, \Limestone\, \Madison\, \Jackson\, \Colbert\, \Franklin\,
    \Lawrence\, \Morgan\, \Marshall\, \Dekalb\, \Marion\, \Winston\,
    \Cullman\, \Blount\, \Etowah\, \Cherokee\, \Lamar\, \Fayette\,
    \Walker\, \Jefferson\, \St. Clair\, \Pickens\, \Tuscaloosa\, \Shelby\
  ))
  )%>%
  #mutate(mme = mme/1000000)%>%
  mutate(Date = mdy(date))%>%
  mutate(County = toupper(county))

arcos_wide_mme <- Data_ARCOS_filted %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols    = c(County, Date),
    names_from = drug,
    values_from= mme,
    values_fill = 0
  )

df_er_drug <- left_join(
  er_data,
  arcos_wide_mme,
  by = c(\County\, \Date\)
)


<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

XG4gICAgRVJfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSAgICAgICAgICAgPSBFUl9hbm51YWwgLyBwb3BfeWVhcixcbiAgICBFUl9hbm51YWxfcGVyMTAwayAgICAgICAgICAgICA9IEVSX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGEgKiAxZTUsXG5cbiAgICBPWFlDT0RPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSAgICA9IE9YWUNPRE9ORV9hbm51YWwgICAgIC8gcG9wX3llYXIsXG4gICAgT1hZQ09ET05FX2FubnVhbF9wZXIxMDBrICAgICAgPSBPWFlDT0RPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSAqIDFlNSxcblxuICAgIEhZRFJPQ09ET05FX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGEgID0gSFlEUk9DT0RPTkVfYW5udWFsICAgLyBwb3BfeWVhcixcbiAgICBIWURST0NPRE9ORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyMTAwayAgICA9IEhZRFJPQ09ET05FX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGEgKiAxZTUsXG5cbiAgICBCVVBSRU5PUlBISU5FX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGEgPSBCVVBSRU5PUlBISU5FX2FubnVhbCAvIHBvcF95ZWFyLFxuICAgIEJVUFJFTk9SUEhJTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcjEwMGsgICA9IEJVUFJFTk9SUEhJTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSAqIDFlNSxcblxuICAgIE1FVEhBRE9ORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhICAgID0gTUVUSEFET05FX2FubnVhbCAgICAgLyBwb3BfeWVhcixcbiAgICBNRVRIQURPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcjEwMGsgICAgICA9IE1FVEhBRE9ORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhICogMWU1XG4gIClcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

# Presence at daily level
df_er_drug <- df_er_drug |>
  mutate(
    year = year(Date),
    presence = if_else(Count > 0, 1L, 0L)
  )

# Aggregate to county × year
df_er_drug_annual <- df_er_drug %>%
  group_by(County, year) %>%
  summarise(
    # population for the year (choose one: mean/first/median)
    pop_year = first(pop),

    # ER annual
    ER_annual = sum(Count, na.rm = TRUE),

    # Drug annual
    OXYCODONE_annual     = sum(OXYCODONE,     na.rm = TRUE),
    HYDROCODONE_annual   = sum(HYDROCODONE,   na.rm = TRUE),
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual = sum(BUPRENORPHINE, na.rm = TRUE),
    METHADONE_annual     = sum(METHADONE,     na.rm = TRUE),

    presence = as.integer(sum(Count, na.rm = TRUE) > 0),
    .groups = \drop\
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # per-capita (proportion) and per 100k (common epidemiology scale)
    ER_annual_percapita           = ER_annual / pop_year,
    ER_annual_per100k             = ER_annual_percapita * 1e5,

    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita    = OXYCODONE_annual     / pop_year,
    OXYCODONE_annual_per100k      = OXYCODONE_annual_percapita * 1e5,

    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita  = HYDROCODONE_annual   / pop_year,
    HYDROCODONE_annual_per100k    = HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita * 1e5,

    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita = BUPRENORPHINE_annual / pop_year,
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_per100k   = BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita * 1e5,

    METHADONE_annual_percapita    = METHADONE_annual     / pop_year,
    METHADONE_annual_per100k      = METHADONE_annual_percapita * 1e5
  )



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->

```r
```r
# Presence at daily level
df_er_drug <- df_er_drug |>
  mutate(
    year = year(Date),
    presence = if_else(Count > 0, 1L, 0L)
  )

# Aggregate to county × year
df_er_drug_annual <- df_er_drug %>%
  group_by(County, year) %>%
  summarise(
    # population for the year (choose one: mean/first/median)
    pop_year = first(pop),

    # ER annual
    ER_annual = sum(Count, na.rm = TRUE),

    # Drug annual
    OXYCODONE_annual     = sum(OXYCODONE,     na.rm = TRUE),
    HYDROCODONE_annual   = sum(HYDROCODONE,   na.rm = TRUE),
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual = sum(BUPRENORPHINE, na.rm = TRUE),
    METHADONE_annual     = sum(METHADONE,     na.rm = TRUE),

    presence = as.integer(sum(Count, na.rm = TRUE) > 0),
    .groups = \drop\
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # per-capita (proportion) and per 100k (common epidemiology scale)
    ER_annual_percapita           = ER_annual / pop_year,
    ER_annual_per100k             = ER_annual_percapita * 1e5,

    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita    = OXYCODONE_annual     / pop_year,
    OXYCODONE_annual_per100k      = OXYCODONE_annual_percapita * 1e5,

    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita  = HYDROCODONE_annual   / pop_year,
    HYDROCODONE_annual_per100k    = HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita * 1e5,

    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita = BUPRENORPHINE_annual / pop_year,
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_per100k   = BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita * 1e5,

    METHADONE_annual_percapita    = METHADONE_annual     / pop_year,
    METHADONE_annual_per100k      = METHADONE_annual_percapita * 1e5
  )
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

mortality_filted <- mortality%>%
  mutate(County = toupper(gsub(\ County
```r
mortality <- read_csv(\../Data/CDCWonder Opioid Related Mortality AL 2016-2019.csv\)

mortality_filted <- mortality%>%
  mutate(County = toupper(gsub(\ County

[1] 2 2 2 2 6 6 6 6 4 4 4 4 5 5 5 5 4 4 4 4 6 6 6 6 5 5 5 5 5 5 5 5 2 2 2 2 6 6 6 6 4 4 4 [44] 4 4 4 4 4 3 3 3 3 3 3 3 3 6 6 6 6 5 5 5 5 4 4 4 4 3 3 3 3 2 2 2 2 3 3 3 3 2 2 2 2 6 6 [87] 6 6 Levels: 2 3 4 5 6




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

In the CDC mortality dataset, only annual data points are available. To address suppressed death counts, we applied *mice* imputation. However, in the spatiotemporal model only 45 of 88 observations passed due to missing values. Among the remaining 44 observations, 21 were recorded as zero.

## 2. Clean and Standardize Data
### 2.1 Select Predictors

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

### 2.2 Data Standardization

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin XG5cbiMgZGZfc2VsZWN0X3pfY29yIDwtIGRmX3NlbGVjdF96ICU+JVxuIyAgIHNlbGVjdCgtYyhcXENvdW50eVxcLFxceWVhclxcLFxccG9wX0NEQ1xcKSklPiVcbiMgICBzZWxlY3QoLWFsbF9vZihzY2FsZV92YXJzKSkgXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

scale_vars <-  c(
    # Deaths
    \Deaths\,
    # ER visit
    \ER_annual_percapita\,
    # Drugs
    \OXYCODONE_annual_percapita\,   \HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita\, \BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita\, \METHADONE_annual_percapita\,

    # ACS
    \unemployee_rate\,  \gini_index\,   \poverty_rate\, \disability_rate\, \noinsurance_rate\
    )

df_select_z <- df_select %>%
  mutate(Deaths_rate= Deaths / pop_CDC)%>%
  mutate(across(all_of(scale_vars), ~ as.numeric(scale(.x)), .names = \{.col}_z\))


# df_select_z_cor <- df_select_z %>%
#   select(-c(\County\,\year\,\pop_CDC\))%>%
#   select(-all_of(scale_vars)) 



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
```r
scale_vars <-  c(
    # Deaths
    \Deaths\,
    # ER visit
    \ER_annual_percapita\,
    # Drugs
    \OXYCODONE_annual_percapita\,   \HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita\, \BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita\, \METHADONE_annual_percapita\,

    # ACS
    \unemployee_rate\,  \gini_index\,   \poverty_rate\, \disability_rate\, \noinsurance_rate\
    )

df_select_z <- df_select %>%
  mutate(Deaths_rate= Deaths / pop_CDC)%>%
  mutate(across(all_of(scale_vars), ~ as.numeric(scale(.x)), .names = \{.col}_z\))


# df_select_z_cor <- df_select_z %>%
#   select(-c(\County\,\year\,\pop_CDC\))%>%
#   select(-all_of(scale_vars)) 
```
```

## 3. Imputation of Death

### 3.1 EM Imputation of Death

#### 3.2.1 Initial Model without Spatiotemporal

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuZGZfZW0gPC0gZGZfc2VsZWN0X3ogJT4lXG4gIG11dGF0ZShcbiAgICBzdXBwcmVzc2VkID0gaXMubmEoRGVhdGhzKSAgIyB0d2VhayBpZiB5b3UgaGF2ZSBhbiBleHBsaWNpdCBmbGFnXG4gICklPiVcbiAgICBtdXRhdGUodGltZV9pbmRleCA9IG1hdGNoKHllYXIsIHNvcnQodW5pcXVlKHllYXIpKSksXG4gICAgICAgICBsb2dfcG9wICAgID0gbG9nKHBvcF9DREMpKVxuXG5cbiMgRml4ZWQgZWZmZWN0cyB1c2VkIGluIGJvdGggRS9NIHN0ZXBzOlxuZm9ybV9maXhlZCA8LSBEZWF0aHMgfiBVUmNvZGUrIEVSX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGFfeiArIE9YWUNPRE9ORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhX3ogK1xuICBIWURST0NPRE9ORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhX3ogKyBCVVBSRU5PUlBISU5FX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGFfeiArXG4gIE1FVEhBRE9ORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhX3ogKyB1bmVtcGxveWVlX3JhdGVfeiArIGdpbmlfaW5kZXhfeiArXG4gIHBvdmVydHlfcmF0ZV96ICsgZGlzYWJpbGl0eV9yYXRlX3ogKyBub2luc3VyYW5jZV9yYXRlX3pcblxuIyBmb3JtX2ZpeGVkIDwtIERlYXRocyB+IEVSX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGFfeiArIE9YWUNPRE9ORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhX3ogK1xuIyAgIEhZRFJPQ09ET05FX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGFfeiArIEJVUFJFTk9SUEhJTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YV96ICtcbiMgICBNRVRIQURPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YV96XG5cblxuIyBLZWVwIG9ubHkgcm93cyB5b3UgY2FuIG1vZGVsIChubyBOQSBpbiB5LCBjb29yZHMsIG9mZnNldCwgb3IgcHJlZGljdG9ycylcbmRhdGFfZml0IDwtIGRmX2VtICU+JVxuICBmaWx0ZXIoIWlzLm5hKERlYXRocykpXG5cblxuIyBGaXRcbmZpdF9pbml0IDwtIHNkbVRNQihcbiAgZm9ybXVsYSA9IGZvcm1fZml4ZWQsXG4gIGRhdGEgICAgPSBkYXRhX2ZpdCxcbiAgI21lc2ggICAgPSBtZXNoX2ZpdCxcbiAgZmFtaWx5ICA9IG5iaW5vbTEobGluayA9IFwibG9nXCIpLFxuICBzcGF0aWFsID0gXCJvZmZcIixcbiAgc3BhdGlvdGVtcG9yYWwgPSBcIm9mZlwiLFxuICBvZmZzZXQgID0gZGF0YV9maXQkbG9nX3BvcCxcbiAgY29udHJvbCA9IHNkbVRNQmNvbnRyb2wobmV3dG9uX2xvb3BzID0gMSlcbilcbnN1bW1hcnkoZml0X2luaXQpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
df_em <- df_select_z %>%
  mutate(
    suppressed = is.na(Deaths)  # tweak if you have an explicit flag
  )%>%
    mutate(time_index = match(year, sort(unique(year))),
         log_pop    = log(pop_CDC))


# Fixed effects used in both E/M steps:
form_fixed <- Deaths ~ URcode+ ER_annual_percapita_z + OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
  HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z + BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
  METHADONE_annual_percapita_z + unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
  poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z

# form_fixed <- Deaths ~ ER_annual_percapita_z + OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
#   HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z + BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
#   METHADONE_annual_percapita_z


# Keep only rows you can model (no NA in y, coords, offset, or predictors)
data_fit <- df_em %>%
  filter(!is.na(Deaths))


# Fit
fit_init <- sdmTMB(
  formula = form_fixed,
  data    = data_fit,
  #mesh    = mesh_fit,
  family  = nbinom1(link = "log"),
  spatial = "off",
  spatiotemporal = "off",
  offset  = data_fit$log_pop,
  control = sdmTMBcontrol(newton_loops = 1)
)
summary(fit_init)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBQcmVkaWN0IM68IG9uIEFMTCByb3dzIChpbmNsdWRpbmcgc3VwcHJlc3NlZCkgdXNpbmcgZml4ZWQrc3BhdGlhbCBpbml0XG5wX2luaXQgPC0gcHJlZGljdChmaXRfaW5pdCwgbmV3ZGF0YSA9IGRmX2VtLCByZV9mb3JtID0gTkEpICAjIGluY2x1ZGUgc3BhdGlhbCBSRiBmcm9tIGluaXRcbm11X2hhdCA8LSBleHAocF9pbml0JGVzdClcblxucGhpIDwtIGV4cChmaXRfaW5pdCRwYXJsaXN0JGxuX3BoaSlcblxuI3N0b3BpZm5vdChpcy5maW5pdGUocGhpKSlcblxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
# Predict μ on ALL rows (including suppressed) using fixed+spatial init
p_init <- predict(fit_init, newdata = df_em, re_form = NA)  # include spatial RF from init
mu_hat <- exp(p_init$est)

phi <- exp(fit_init$parlist$ln_phi)

#stopifnot(is.finite(phi))

```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

In EM method, we used basic model without spatial and spatiotemperol. We have tried full model, but it cannot converge, due to the limited sample size.


#### 3.2.2 Deterministic EM

Set the lower and upper bound

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

```r
max_iter <- 20
df_em$Deaths_em <- df_em$Deaths          # create once
tol    <- 1e-3
ll_old <- -Inf


for (iter in 1:max_iter) {

  # --- E-step: impute suppressed cells using current mean ---
  idx <- df_em$suppressed
  if (any(idx)) {
    #df_em$Deaths_imp[idx] <- round(mu_hat[idx])  # simple expected fill
    #df_em$Deaths_em[idx] <- pmax(1, round(mu_hat[idx]))
    df_em$Deaths_em[idx] <- pmin(9, pmax(1, round(mu_hat[idx])))

  }

  # --- M-step: refit model with updated data ---
  df_mod <- df_em
  df_mod$Deaths <- df_mod$Deaths_em

  fit_full <- sdmTMB(
    formula = form_fixed,
    data    = df_mod,
    family  = nbinom1(link = "log"),
    spatial = "off",
    spatiotemporal = "off",
    offset  = df_mod$log_pop,
    control = sdmTMBcontrol(newton_loops = 1)
  )

  # --- update parameters ---
  mu_new <- exp(predict(fit_full)$est)
  phi_new <- fit_full$family$phi
  ll_new <- as.numeric(logLik(fit_full))

  # --- check convergence ---
  if (abs(ll_new - ll_old) < tol) {
    message(sprintf("EM converged at iter %d (ΔLL=%.4f)", iter, ll_new - ll_old))
    break
  }

  # --- prepare next iteration ---
  mu_hat <- mu_new
  phi <- phi_new
  ll_old <- ll_new
}

# final imputed data
df_final <- df_em
df_final$Deaths_em
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

### 3.2 Fixed Imputation of Death

```r
#Impute missing Deaths with 5
df_imputated <- df_final %>%
  mutate(Deaths_5 = ifelse(is.na(Deaths), 5, Deaths),
         Deaths_1 = ifelse(is.na(Deaths), 1, Deaths),
         Deaths_9 = ifelse(is.na(Deaths), 9, Deaths)
         )%>%
  mutate(Deaths_5_z = scale(Deaths_5/pop_CDC),
         Deaths_1_z = scale(Deaths_1/pop_CDC),
         Deaths_9_z = scale(Deaths_9/pop_CDC),
         Deaths_em_z = scale(Deaths_em/pop_CDC),
         Deaths_em_rate = Deaths_em/pop_CDC,
         )

# No imputation
# mortality_filted_imputated <- mortality_filted

```

```r
df_imputated_check <- df_imputated%>%
  select(Deaths,Deaths_1,Deaths_5,Deaths_9,Deaths_em,Deaths_em_z)

datatable(
  df_imputated_check,
  filter = "top", 
  options = list(
    pageLength = 50,
    autoWidth = TRUE
  )
)

```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Imputing all suppressed deaths as a fixed value (5 for 1–9) can easily dampen or distort the spatial–temporal signal.

Why this can wash out spatiotemporal effects

Attenuation of variance: Replacing a whole range (1–9) with a single number shrinks true variability across counties/years. Less variance ⇒ weaker evidence for spatial or temporal structure.

Systematic bias: Suppression is not random (it occurs at low counts). Mid-point imputation pulls low-count areas toward the same value, making neighboring differences look smaller and weakening spatial gradients.

Few years (2016–2019): With only 4 time points, any variance compression makes AR(1)/IID effects even harder to estimate.

Per-capita scaling: If denominators vary a lot, a flat imputation in counts translates into uneven bias in rates, further masking structure.


What to do (quick, practical sensitivity checks)

1.Bracketing analysis (deterministic):

Refit with all suppressed set to 1 (lower bound) and to 9 (upper bound).

Compare AIC, σ_ST, and (if AR1) ρ across the three datasets (1, 5, 9). If σ_ST/ρ jump under 1 or 9, your ST result is sensitive to the imputation.

2.Multiple imputation (simple, nonparametric):

For each suppressed cell, draw a uniform integer 1–9; do this M times, fit the model to each, and pool σ_ST (and ρ).

3.Model-based imputation (better):

Fit a preliminary NB1 model without ST, predict μ̂, then for suppressed cells draw y ~ Truncated-NB(μ̂, θ; 1..9). Repeat M times and refit the full ST model. This respects your outcome distribution.

4.Interval-likelihood (best, Bayesian or custom):

Treat suppressed values as interval-censored counts (P(1≤Y≤9)). A Bayesian Poisson/NB BYM2/INLA model can incorporate this directly; in sdmTMB, you’d need custom likelihood.



## 4. Correlation of Predictors

### 4.1 Select Predictors

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

```r
df_cor <- df_imputated%>%
  select(
    County,
    URcode,
    year,
    pop_CDC,
    # Deaths
    Deaths,
    Deaths_1,
    Deaths_5,
    Deaths_9,
    Deaths_em,
    # ER visit
    ER_annual,
    ER_annual_percapita,
    # Drugs
    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita, HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita,   BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita, METHADONE_annual_percapita,

    # ACS
    unemployee_rate,    gini_index, poverty_rate,   disability_rate, noinsurance_rate
    )

```

```r

#Choose Death from Deaths, Deaths_rate, Deaths_1, Death_5, Death_9, Death_em
# Death_select <- "Deaths_em"
Death_select <- c("Deaths","Deaths_1", "Deaths_5", "Deaths_9","Deaths_em")

scale_vars <-  c(
    # Deaths
#######################################################  
    
    #"Deaths"
    Death_select,
#######################################################    
    # ER visit
    "ER_annual",
    "ER_annual_percapita",
    # Drugs
    "OXYCODONE_annual_percapita",   "HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita", "BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita", "METHADONE_annual_percapita",

    # ACS
    "unemployee_rate",  "gini_index",   "poverty_rate", "disability_rate", "noinsurance_rate"
    )

df_cor_rate <- df_cor %>%
  mutate(Deaths_rate = Deaths / pop_CDC)%>%
  mutate(Deaths_1_rate = Deaths_1 / pop_CDC)%>% 
  mutate(Deaths_5_rate = Deaths_5 / pop_CDC)%>%  
  mutate(Deaths_9_rate = Deaths_9 / pop_CDC)%>%  
  mutate(Deaths_em_rate = Deaths_em / pop_CDC)%>%  
  mutate(across(all_of(scale_vars), ~ as.numeric(scale(.x)), .names = "{.col}_z"))


df_cor_rate_only_cor <- df_cor_rate %>%
  select(-c("County","year","pop_CDC"))%>%
  select(-all_of(scale_vars)) 
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->




<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucF9oZWF0IDwtIGdnY29ycihcbiAgZGZfY29yX3JhdGVfb25seV9jb3IgLFxuICBtZXRob2QgPSBjKFwicGFpcndpc2UuY29tcGxldGUub2JzXCIsIFwicGVhcnNvblwiKSxcbiAgbGFiZWwgPSBUUlVFLCBsYWJlbF9zaXplID0gMywgaGp1c3QgPSAwLjksIGxheW91dC5leHAgPSAxXG4pICsgdGhlbWVfbWluaW1hbChiYXNlX3NpemUgPSAxMClcbnByaW50KHBfaGVhdClcblxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
p_heat <- ggcorr(
  df_cor_rate_only_cor ,
  method = c("pairwise.complete.obs", "pearson"),
  label = TRUE, label_size = 3, hjust = 0.9, layout.exp = 1
) + theme_minimal(base_size = 10)
print(p_heat)

```

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuZGZfY29yX3JhdGVfbnVtIDwtIGRmX2Nvcl9yYXRlICU+JSBcbiAgI3NlbGVjdCh3aGVyZShpcy5udW1lcmljKSkgICAgICMga2VlcCBvbmx5IG51bWVyaWMgdmFyc1xuICBzZWxlY3QoRGVhdGhzX2VtLERlYXRoc19lbV9yYXRlLCBFUl9hbm51YWwsIEVSX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGEsIE9YWUNPRE9ORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhLCBIWURST0NPRE9ORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhLCBCVVBSRU5PUlBISU5FX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGEsIE1FVEhBRE9ORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhLFxuICAgICAgICAgdW5lbXBsb3llZV9yYXRlLCBnaW5pX2luZGV4LCBwb3ZlcnR5X3JhdGUsIGRpc2FiaWxpdHlfcmF0ZSwgbm9pbnN1cmFuY2VfcmF0ZVxuICApXG5cbnBfcGFpcnMgPC0gZ2dwYWlycyhcbiAgZGZfY29yX3JhdGVfbnVtLFxuICB1cHBlciA9IGxpc3QoY29udGludW91cyA9IHdyYXAoXCJjb3JcIiwgdXNlID0gXCJwYWlyd2lzZS5jb21wbGV0ZS5vYnNcIiwgc2l6ZSA9IDMpKSxcbiAgbG93ZXIgPSBsaXN0KGNvbnRpbnVvdXMgPSB3cmFwKFwicG9pbnRzXCIsIGFscGhhID0gMC40LCBzaXplID0gMC43KSksXG4gIGRpYWcgID0gbGlzdChjb250aW51b3VzID0gd3JhcChcImRlbnNpdHlEaWFnXCIsIGFscGhhID0gMC42KSlcbikgK1xuICB0aGVtZShcbiAgICBheGlzLnRleHQgID0gZWxlbWVudF90ZXh0KHNpemUgPSA3KSxcbiAgICBzdHJpcC50ZXh0ID0gZWxlbWVudF90ZXh0KHNpemUgPSA4KVxuICApXG5cbnByaW50KHBfcGFpcnMpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
df_cor_rate_num <- df_cor_rate %>% 
  #select(where(is.numeric))     # keep only numeric vars
  select(Deaths_em,Deaths_em_rate, ER_annual, ER_annual_percapita, OXYCODONE_annual_percapita, HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita, BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita, METHADONE_annual_percapita,
         unemployee_rate, gini_index, poverty_rate, disability_rate, noinsurance_rate
  )

p_pairs <- ggpairs(
  df_cor_rate_num,
  upper = list(continuous = wrap("cor", use = "pairwise.complete.obs", size = 3)),
  lower = list(continuous = wrap("points", alpha = 0.4, size = 0.7)),
  diag  = list(continuous = wrap("densityDiag", alpha = 0.6))
) +
  theme(
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8)
  )

print(p_pairs)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

#### 4.2.1 Check Collinearity


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxubGlicmFyeShjb3JycGxvdClcblxuY29yX21hdCA8LSBjb3IoZGZfY29yX3JhdGVfbnVtLCB1c2UgPSBcInBhaXJ3aXNlLmNvbXBsZXRlLm9ic1wiKVxuXG5jb3JycGxvdChjb3JfbWF0LCBtZXRob2QgPSBcImNvbG9yXCIsIHRsLmNleCA9IDAuOCwgbnVtYmVyLmNleCA9IDAuNylcblxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
library(corrplot)

cor_mat <- cor(df_cor_rate_num, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

corrplot(cor_mat, method = "color", tl.cex = 0.8, number.cex = 0.7)

```

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


#### 4.2.2 Variance Inflation Factor (VIF)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHViR2xpY21GeWVTaGpZWElwWEc1Y2JtMGdQQzBnYkcwb1hHNGdJRVJsWVhSb2MxOWxiU0IrSUVWU1gyRnViblZoYkY5d1pYSmpZWEJwZEdFZ0t5QmNiaUFnSUNCUFdGbERUMFJQVGtWZllXNXVkV0ZzWDNCbGNtTmhjR2wwWVNBclhHNGdJQ0FnU0ZsRVVrOURUMFJQVGtWZllXNXVkV0ZzWDNCbGNtTmhjR2wwWVNBclhHNGdJQ0FnUWxWUVVrVk9UMUpRU0VsT1JWOWhibTUxWVd4ZmNHVnlZMkZ3YVhSaElDdGNiaUFnSUNCTlJWUklRVVJQVGtWZllXNXVkV0ZzWDNCbGNtTmhjR2wwWVNBclhHNGdJQ0FnZFc1bGJYQnNiM2xsWlY5eVlYUmxJQ3NnWjJsdWFWOXBibVJsZUNBcklIQnZkbVZ5ZEhsZmNtRjBaU0FySUZ4dUlDQWdJR1JwYzJGaWFXeHBkSGxmY21GMFpTQXJJRzV2YVc1emRYSmhibU5sWDNKaGRHVXNYRzRnSUdSaGRHRWdQU0JrWmw5amIzSmZjbUYwWlY5dWRXMWNiaWxjYmx4dWRtbG1YM1poYkhWbGN5QThMU0JqWVhJNk9uWnBaaWh0S1Z4dWRtbG1YM1poYkhWbGMxeHVZR0JnSW4wPSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxubGlicmFyeShjYXIpXG5cbm0gPC0gbG0oXG4gIERlYXRoc19lbSB+IEVSX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGEgKyBcbiAgICBPWFlDT0RPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSArXG4gICAgSFlEUk9DT0RPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSArXG4gICAgQlVQUkVOT1JQSElORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhICtcbiAgICBNRVRIQURPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSArXG4gICAgdW5lbXBsb3llZV9yYXRlICsgZ2luaV9pbmRleCArIHBvdmVydHlfcmF0ZSArIFxuICAgIGRpc2FiaWxpdHlfcmF0ZSArIG5vaW5zdXJhbmNlX3JhdGUsXG4gIGRhdGEgPSBkZl9jb3JfcmF0ZV9udW1cbilcblxudmlmX3ZhbHVlcyA8LSBjYXI6OnZpZihtKVxudmlmX3ZhbHVlc1xuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxubGlicmFyeShjYXIpXG5cbm0gPC0gbG0oXG4gIERlYXRoc19lbSB+IEVSX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGEgKyBcbiAgICBPWFlDT0RPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSArXG4gICAgSFlEUk9DT0RPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSArXG4gICAgQlVQUkVOT1JQSElORV9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhICtcbiAgICBNRVRIQURPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSArXG4gICAgdW5lbXBsb3llZV9yYXRlICsgZ2luaV9pbmRleCArIHBvdmVydHlfcmF0ZSArIFxuICAgIGRpc2FiaWxpdHlfcmF0ZSArIG5vaW5zdXJhbmNlX3JhdGUsXG4gIGRhdGEgPSBkZl9jb3JfcmF0ZV9udW1cbilcblxudmlmX3ZhbHVlcyA8LSBjYXI6OnZpZihtKVxudmlmX3ZhbHVlc1xuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
library(car)

m <- lm(
  Deaths_em ~ ER_annual_percapita + 
    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita +
    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita +
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita +
    METHADONE_annual_percapita +
    unemployee_rate + gini_index + poverty_rate + 
    disability_rate + noinsurance_rate,
  data = df_cor_rate_num
)

vif_values <- car::vif(m)
vif_values
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiICAgICAgICAgICBFUl9hbm51YWxfcGVyY2FwaXRhICAgICBPWFlDT0RPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSAgIEhZRFJPQ09ET05FX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGEgXG4gICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgMS4zMjc5NTcgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgIDQuODQwNTE4ICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICA0Ljc0MTQ4OSBcbkJVUFJFTk9SUEhJTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSAgICAgTUVUSEFET05FX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGEgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgdW5lbXBsb3llZV9yYXRlIFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgIDIuMjIyNjA1ICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAxLjcxNjM1MiAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgMy45ODExOTUgXG4gICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgIGdpbmlfaW5kZXggICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgcG92ZXJ0eV9yYXRlICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgIGRpc2FiaWxpdHlfcmF0ZSBcbiAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAxLjg0NzE1OCAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgMy42ODA0NjUgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgIDMuNjM1MjE5IFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICBub2luc3VyYW5jZV9yYXRlIFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgIDIuMjUyMDQxIFxuIn0= -->

```
           ER_annual_percapita     OXYCODONE_annual_percapita   HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita 
                      1.327957                       4.840518                       4.741489 
BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita     METHADONE_annual_percapita                unemployee_rate 
                      2.222605                       1.716352                       3.981195 
                    gini_index                   poverty_rate                disability_rate 
                      1.847158                       3.680465                       3.635219 
              noinsurance_rate 
                      2.252041 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

VIF < 3 → No concern

3–5 → Mild collinearity

5–10 → Consider removing / combining predictors

 #>10 → Serious multicollinearity


## 5. Spatiotemporal Model [Updated]

### 5.1 County geometry & coordinates

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

-->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBBTCBjb3VudGllcyBpbiBVVE0gMTZOIChtZXRlcnMpLCB0aGVuIGNvbnZlcnQgdG8ga20gbnVtZXJpYyBjb29yZHNcbmNvdW50aWVzX3NmIDwtIHRpZ3Jpczo6Y291bnRpZXMoc3RhdGUgPSBcIkFMXCIsIGNiID0gVFJVRSwgeWVhciA9IDIwMjMpIHw+XG4gIHN0X3RyYW5zZm9ybSgyNjkxNikgfD5cbiAgbXV0YXRlKENvdW50eSA9IHRvdXBwZXIoTkFNRSkpXG5cbmNvb3Jkc19tICA8LSBzdF9jb29yZGluYXRlcyhzdF9jZW50cm9pZChzdF9nZW9tZXRyeShjb3VudGllc19zZikpKVxuY291bnR5X3h5IDwtIGNvdW50aWVzX3NmIHw+XG4gIHN0X2Ryb3BfZ2VvbWV0cnkoKSB8PlxuICB0cmFuc211dGUoXG4gICAgQ291bnR5LFxuICAgIFggPSBjb29yZHNfbVssIFwiWFwiXSAvIDEwMDAsICAjIGttXG4gICAgWSA9IGNvb3Jkc19tWywgXCJZXCJdIC8gMTAwMFxuICApXG5cbiMgTWVyZ2UgY29vcmRzIGludG8gbW9kZWwgZnJhbWVcbmRmIDwtIGRmX2Nvcl9yYXRlIHw+XG4gIGxlZnRfam9pbihjb3VudHlfeHksIGJ5ID0gXCJDb3VudHlcIikgfD5cbiAgZmlsdGVyKGlzLmZpbml0ZShYKSwgaXMuZmluaXRlKFkpLCBpcy5maW5pdGUocG9wX0NEQykpJT4lXG4gIG11dGF0ZSh0aW1lX2luZGV4ID0gbWF0Y2goeWVhciwgc29ydCh1bmlxdWUoeWVhcikpKSxcbiAgICAgICAgIGxvZ19wb3AgICAgPSBsb2cocG9wX0NEQykpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
# AL counties in UTM 16N (meters), then convert to km numeric coords
counties_sf <- tigris::counties(state = "AL", cb = TRUE, year = 2023) |>
  st_transform(26916) |>
  mutate(County = toupper(NAME))

coords_m  <- st_coordinates(st_centroid(st_geometry(counties_sf)))
county_xy <- counties_sf |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  transmute(
    County,
    X = coords_m[, "X"] / 1000,  # km
    Y = coords_m[, "Y"] / 1000
  )

# Merge coords into model frame
df <- df_cor_rate |>
  left_join(county_xy, by = "County") |>
  filter(is.finite(X), is.finite(Y), is.finite(pop_CDC))%>%
  mutate(time_index = match(year, sort(unique(year))),
         log_pop    = log(pop_CDC))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


#### 5.1.1 Mesh

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyMjIE1lc2ggKGJ1aWx0IG9uIHRoZSBkYXRhIGFjdHVhbGx5IG1vZGVsZWQpXG4jIEN1dG9mZiB+IDEwJSBvZiBYLXJhbmdlIGluIGttICh0dW5lIGlmIHRvbyBjb2Fyc2UvZmluZSlcbm1lc2ggPC0gbWFrZV9tZXNoKFxuICBkZixcbiAgeHlfY29scyA9IGMoXCJYXCIsXCJZXCIpLFxuICBjdXRvZmYgPSBkaWZmKHJhbmdlKGRmJFgsIG5hLnJtID0gVFJVRSkpIC8gMTBcbilcblxuXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
### Mesh (built on the data actually modeled)
# Cutoff ~ 10% of X-range in km (tune if too coarse/fine)
mesh <- make_mesh(
  df,
  xy_cols = c("X","Y"),
  cutoff = diff(range(df$X, na.rm = TRUE)) / 10
)

```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->

YXRlX3ogKyBub2luc3VyYW5jZV9yYXRlX3pcbiAgICApICtcbiAgICBVUmNvZGUgKiAoXG4gICAgICBPWFlDT0RPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YV96ICtcbiAgICAgIEhZRFJPQ09ET05FX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGFfeiArXG4gICAgICBCVVBSRU5PUlBISU5FX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGFfeiArXG4gICAgICBNRVRIQURPTkVfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YV96ICtcbiAgICAgIHVuZW1wbG95ZWVfcmF0ZV96ICsgZ2luaV9pbmRleF96ICtcbiAgICAgIHBvdmVydHlfcmF0ZV96ICsgZGlzYWJpbGl0eV9yYXRlX3ogKyBub2luc3VyYW5jZV9yYXRlX3pcbiAgICApICtcbiAgICB0aW1lX2luZGV4XG4pXG5cblxuXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
## Full main-effects model (ER . opioids . SES)
form_ER.All <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +                 # ER visits
    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +                    # opioid types
    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
    METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
)

## ER only
form_ER <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z
)

## ER . Opioids (additive)
form_ER.Opioid <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +
    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
    METHADONE_annual_percapita_z
)

## ER . SES (additive)
form_ER.SES <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
)

## ER . Time (additive linear)
form_ER.Time <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +
    time_index
)

## ER . SplineTime (additive nonlinear)
form_ER.Spline <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +
    s(time_index, k = 4)
)

## ER x Time (interaction)
form_ERxTime <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z * time_index
)

## ER . SES . SplineTime (additive, no interaction)
form_ER.SES.Spline <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z +
    s(time_index, k = 4)
)

## ER x Opioid . SES (ER interacts with opioids; SES additive)
form_ERxOpioid.SES <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z
    ) +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
)

## ER x SES . Opioid (ER interacts with SES; opioids additive)
form_ERxSES.Opioid <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z * (
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
    METHADONE_annual_percapita_z
)

## ER x (Opioid + SES) . Spline (maximal interaction)
form_ERxOpioidSES.Spline <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    s(time_index, k = 4)
)

form_ERxOpioidSES.Time <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    time_index
)


form_ERxOpioidSES_UR.Time <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    URcode * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    time_index
)


form_ERxUR.ERxOpioidSES.URxOpioidSES.Time <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em_rate ~ ER_annual_percapita_z * URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    URcode * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    time_index
)

```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


#### Create Formula for Deaths_em, instead of Death rate

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

-->

```r
## MODEL FORMULAS ( "." = additive, "x" = interaction )

## Full main-effects model (ER . opioids . SES)
form_ER.All <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +                 # ER visits
    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +                    # opioid types
    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
    METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
)

## ER only
form_ER <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z
)

## ER . Opioids (additive)
form_ER.Opioid <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +
    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
    METHADONE_annual_percapita_z
)

## ER . SES (additive)
form_ER.SES <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
)

## ER . Time (additive linear)
form_ER.Time <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +
    time_index
)

## ER . SplineTime (additive nonlinear)
form_ER.Spline <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +
    s(time_index, k = 4)
)

## ER x Time (interaction)
form_ERxTime <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z * time_index
)

## ER . SES . SplineTime (additive, no interaction)
form_ER.SES.Spline <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + ER_annual_percapita_z +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z +
    s(time_index, k = 4)
)

## ER x Opioid . SES (ER interacts with opioids; SES additive)
form_ERxOpioid.SES <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z
    ) +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
)

## ER x SES . Opioid (ER interacts with SES; opioids additive)
form_ERxSES.Opioid <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z * (
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
    METHADONE_annual_percapita_z
)

## ER x (Opioid + SES) . Spline (maximal interaction)
form_ERxOpioidSES.Spline <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    s(time_index, k = 4)
)

form_ERxOpioidSES.Time <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    time_index
)


form_ER.URxOpioid.SES.Time <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z +
    URcode * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z) +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
     +
    time_index
)


form_ERxUR.ERxOpioidSES.URxOpioidSES.Time <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ ER_annual_percapita_z * URcode + 
    ER_annual_percapita_z * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    URcode * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    time_index
)


form_ERxUR.Opioid.SES.Time <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ ER_annual_percapita_z * URcode + 
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z +
    time_index
)

```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->




### 5.3 Model Comparison and Curvature Testing (For EM) [Updated]

-->

```r
# ---------- helper: fit with warning capture ----------
fit_with_warnings <- function(expr) {
  warns <- character(0)
  res <- withCallingHandlers(
    try(expr, silent = TRUE),
    warning = function(w) {
      warns <<- c(warns, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )
  list(result = res, warnings = warns)
}

# ---------- grids ----------
families <- list(
  NB2     = nbinom2(link = "log"),
  Poisson = poisson(link = "log")
)
spatial_opts <- c("off","on")
st_opts      <- c("off","ar1") # "iid" if you want it

# [New] Try different form. 11.12
form_opts <- c(
  "form_ER",
  "form_ER.Opioid",
  "form_ER.SES",
  "form_ER.Time",
  "form_ER.Spline",
  "form_ERxTime",
  "form_ER.SES.Spline",
  "form_ERxOpioid.SES",
  "form_ERxSES.Opioid",
  "form_ERxOpioidSES.Spline",
  "form_ERxOpioidSES.Time",
  "form_ER.URxOpioid.SES.Time",
  "form_ER.All",
  "form_ERxUR.ERxOpioidSES.URxOpioidSES.Time",
  "form_ERxUR.Opioid.SES.Time"
)


fits <- list()
rows <- list()
i <- 1

for (fam_name in names(families)) {
  fam <- families[[fam_name]]
  for (sp in spatial_opts) {
    for (st in st_opts) {
      for (form in form_opts) {

        # confirm the formula object exists and fetch it
        if (!exists(form, inherits = TRUE)) {
          warning(sprintf("Formula object '%s' not found; skipping.", form))
          next
        }
        form_obj <- get(form, inherits = TRUE)

        # time index only when spatiotemporal != "off"
        time_arg <- if (st == "off") NULL else "time_index"

        # include form name in model label (and avoid sprintf mismatch)
        model_name <- paste0(
          fam_name, "_",
          "sp", toupper(sp), "_",
          toupper(st), "_",
          form
        )

        cat("Fitting:", model_name, "\n")

        res <- fit_with_warnings(
          sdmTMB(
            formula = form_obj,
            data = df,
            mesh = mesh,
            family = fam,
            spatial = sp,
            spatiotemporal = st,
            time = time_arg,
            offset = df$log_pop,
            control = sdmTMBcontrol(newton_loops = 3)
          )
        )

        if (!inherits(res$result, "try-error")) {
          fit_i <- res$result
          fits[[model_name]] <- fit_i

          # --- diagnostics ---
          pd <- tryCatch(isTRUE(fit_i$sd_report$pdHess), error = function(e) NA)
          grad_max <- tryCatch({
            g <- fit_i$sd_report$gradient.fixed
            if (is.null(g) || length(g) == 0) NA_real_ else suppressWarnings(max(abs(g), na.rm = TRUE))
          }, error = function(e) NA_real_)
          warn_txt <- paste(unique(res$warnings), collapse = " | ")
          warn_hessian <- grepl("Hessian", warn_txt, ignore.case = TRUE)
          warn_nan     <- grepl("NaN", warn_txt, ignore.case = TRUE)

          rows[[i]] <- tibble::tibble(
            model = model_name,
            family = fam_name,
            spatial = sp,
            spatiotemporal = st,
            form = form,
            AIC = tryCatch(AIC(fit_i), error = function(e) NA_real_),
            logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit_i)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
            npar = tryCatch(attr(logLik(fit_i), "df"), error = function(e) NA_integer_),
            hessian_pd = pd,
            grad_max = grad_max,
            converged_strict = isTRUE(pd) && is.finite(grad_max) && grad_max < 1e-3,
            n_warnings = length(res$warnings),
            warn_hessian = warn_hessian,
            warn_nan = warn_nan,
            first_warning = if (length(res$warnings)) res$warnings[[1]] else NA_character_
          )
        } else {
          rows[[i]] <- tibble::tibble(
            model = model_name,
            family = fam_name,
            spatial = sp,
            spatiotemporal = st,
            form = form,
            AIC = NA_real_, logLik = NA_real_, npar = NA_integer_,
            hessian_pd = NA, grad_max = NA_real_, converged_strict = FALSE,
            n_warnings = length(res$warnings),
            warn_hessian = grepl("Hessian", paste(res$warnings, collapse=" | "), ignore.case = TRUE),
            warn_nan = grepl("NaN", paste(res$warnings, collapse=" | "), ignore.case = TRUE),
            first_warning = if (length(res$warnings)) res$warnings[[1]] else NA_character_
          )
        }

        i <- i + 1
      }
    }
  }
}



aic_table <- bind_rows(rows) %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  mutate(DeltaAIC = AIC - min(AIC, na.rm = TRUE))

#print(aic_table, n = nrow(aic_table))

datatable(
  aic_table,
  filter = "top", 
  options = list(
    pageLength = 50,
    autoWidth = TRUE
  )
)


#write.csv(aic_table, "output/aic_table.csv", row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(fits, "../Shiny/fits.rds")

```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

```r
# --- extract coefficient info for ER_annual_percapita_z ---
coef_info <- lapply(names(fits), function(mname) {
  fit_i <- fits[[mname]]
  if (inherits(fit_i, "sdmTMB")) {
    td <- tryCatch(broom::tidy(fit_i), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(td) && "term" %in% names(td)) {

      
      
      row <- td[td$term == "ER_annual_percapita_z", c("term", "estimate", "std.error"), drop = FALSE]
      # row <- td[td$term == "ER_annual_percapita_z", c("term", "estimate", "std.error"), drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(row) == 1) {
        return(tibble(
          model = mname,
          coef_est = round(row$estimate,3),
          coef_se = round(row$std.error,3)
        ))
      }
    }
  }
  tibble(model = mname, coef_est = NA_real_, coef_se = NA_real_)
})

coef_df <- bind_rows(coef_info)

# --- join back to AIC table ---
aic_table_coef <- aic_table %>%
  left_join(coef_df, by = "model")

# view top models
#print(aic_table_coef %>% select(model, AIC, DeltaAIC, coef_est, coef_se))

datatable(
  aic_table_coef,
  filter = "top", 
  options = list(
    pageLength = 50,
    autoWidth = TRUE
  )
)

#write.csv(aic_table_coef, "output/aic_table_coef.csv", row.names = FALSE)



saveRDS(aic_table_coef, "../Shiny/aic_table_coef.rds")

save(
  df,
  fits,
  aic_table_coef,
  file = "../Shiny/models.RData"
)

```

# Find the row for the combo

family.select = \Poisson\  # Replace with \Poisson\, \NB1\, \NB2\
spatial.select = \on\      # Replace with \on\, \off\
spatiotemporla.select = \ar1\     # Replace with \off\, \iid\, \ar1\
form.select = \form_ERxOpioidSES.Time\                  #\form\,  \form.er\,  \form.er.cov\,  \form.inter.cov\,   \form.er.spline\,  \form.er.cov.spline\,  \form.inter.cov.spline\



idx <- with(aic_table, which(family == family.select & 
                               spatial == spatial.select & 
                               spatiotemporal == spatiotemporla.select &
                               form == form.select))

stopifnot(length(idx) == 1)          # ensure it exists uniquely
fit <- fits[[idx]]      # create the named object you expected

summary(fit)

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuIyBGaW5kIHRoZSByb3cgZm9yIHRoZSBjb21ib1xuXG5mYW1pbHkuc2VsZWN0ID0gXFxQb2lzc29uXFwgICMgUmVwbGFjZSB3aXRoIFxcUG9pc3NvblxcLCBcXE5CMVxcLCBcXE5CMlxcXG5zcGF0aWFsLnNlbGVjdCA9IFxcb25cXCAgICAgICMgUmVwbGFjZSB3aXRoIFxcb25cXCwgXFxvZmZcXFxuc3BhdGlvdGVtcG9ybGEuc2VsZWN0ID0gXFxhcjFcXCAgICAgIyBSZXBsYWNlIHdpdGggXFxvZmZcXCwgXFxpaWRcXCwgXFxhcjFcXFxuZm9ybS5zZWxlY3QgPSBcXGZvcm1fRVJ4T3Bpb2lkU0VTLlRpbWVcXCAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICNcXGZvcm1cXCwgIFxcZm9ybS5lclxcLCAgXFxmb3JtLmVyLmNvdlxcLCAgXFxmb3JtLmludGVyLmNvdlxcLCAgIFxcZm9ybS5lci5zcGxpbmVcXCwgIFxcZm9ybS5lci5jb3Yuc3BsaW5lXFwsICBcXGZvcm0uaW50ZXIuY292LnNwbGluZVxcXG5cblxuXG5pZHggPC0gd2l0aChhaWNfdGFibGUsIHdoaWNoKGZhbWlseSA9PSBmYW1pbHkuc2VsZWN0ICYgXG4gICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgc3BhdGlhbCA9PSBzcGF0aWFsLnNlbGVjdCAmIFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgIHNwYXRpb3RlbXBvcmFsID09IHNwYXRpb3RlbXBvcmxhLnNlbGVjdCAmXG4gICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgZm9ybSA9PSBmb3JtLnNlbGVjdCkpXG5cbnN0b3BpZm5vdChsZW5ndGgoaWR4KSA9PSAxKSAgICAgICAgICAjIGVuc3VyZSBpdCBleGlzdHMgdW5pcXVlbHlcbmZpdCA8LSBmaXRzW1tpZHhdXSAgICAgICMgY3JlYXRlIHRoZSBuYW1lZCBvYmplY3QgeW91IGV4cGVjdGVkXG5cbnN1bW1hcnkoZml0KVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
# Find the row for the combo

family.select = \Poisson\  # Replace with \Poisson\, \NB1\, \NB2\
spatial.select = \on\      # Replace with \on\, \off\
spatiotemporla.select = \ar1\     # Replace with \off\, \iid\, \ar1\
form.select = \form_ERxOpioidSES.Time\                  #\form\,  \form.er\,  \form.er.cov\,  \form.inter.cov\,   \form.er.spline\,  \form.er.cov.spline\,  \form.inter.cov.spline\



idx <- with(aic_table, which(family == family.select & 
                               spatial == spatial.select & 
                               spatiotemporal == spatiotemporla.select &
                               form == form.select))

stopifnot(length(idx) == 1)          # ensure it exists uniquely
fit <- fits[[idx]]      # create the named object you expected

summary(fit)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

Conditional model: coef.est coef.se (Intercept) -9.55 0.06 ER_annual_percapita_z -0.26 0.07 unemployee_rate_z -0.10 0.09 gini_index_z 0.53 0.04 poverty_rate_z -0.55 0.07 disability_rate_z 0.45 0.08 noinsurance_rate_z 0.12 0.07 stime_index 0.00 0.03

Smooth terms: Std. Dev. sds(time_index 0

ML criterion at convergence: 248.414

#### 5.4.1 Try extra optimization

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVabWwwWDI1aU1sOW1kV3hzSUR3dElHWnBkQ0JjYmx4dVptbDBYMjVpTWw5bWRXeHNYMlY0ZEhKaElEd3RJSEoxYmw5bGVIUnlZVjl2Y0hScGJXbDZZWFJwYjI0b1ptbDBYMjVpTWw5bWRXeHNLVnh1WEc1ellXNXBkSGtvWm1sMFgyNWlNbDltZFd4c1gyVjRkSEpoS1Z4dVlHQmdJbjA9IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5maXRfbmIyX2Z1bGwgPC0gZml0IFxuXG5maXRfbmIyX2Z1bGxfZXh0cmEgPC0gcnVuX2V4dHJhX29wdGltaXphdGlvbihmaXRfbmIyX2Z1bGwpXG5cbnNhbml0eShmaXRfbmIyX2Z1bGxfZXh0cmEpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

fit_nb2_full_extra <- run_extra_optimization(fit_nb2_full)

sanity(fit_nb2_full_extra)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZR0JnY2x4dVptbDBYMjVpTWw5bWRXeHNJRHd0SUdacGRDQmNibHh1Wm1sMFgyNWlNbDltZFd4c1gyVjRkSEpoSUR3dElISjFibDlsZUhSeVlWOXZjSFJwYldsNllYUnBiMjRvWm1sMFgyNWlNbDltZFd4c0tWeHVYRzV6WVc1cGRIa29abWwwWDI1aU1sOW1kV3hzWDJWNGRISmhLVnh1WUdCZ1hHNWdZR0FpZlE9PSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZml0X25iMl9mdWxsIDwtIGZpdCBcblxuZml0X25iMl9mdWxsX2V4dHJhIDwtIHJ1bl9leHRyYV9vcHRpbWl6YXRpb24oZml0X25iMl9mdWxsKVxuXG5zYW5pdHkoZml0X25iMl9mdWxsX2V4dHJhKVxuYGBgXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

```r
```r

```
```

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

If this were ecology (fish stock assessment):

→ reviewers accept gradients < 0.01

If this were epidemiology / applied ML / public health:

→ gradients < 0.005 are often accepted
→ especially with spatial models

If this were statistics / econometrics journal:

→ they expect gradients < 0.001
→ but you can still justify your model with:

sanity() output

residual diagnostics

AIC

robustness checks with simpler models

#### 5.4.3 For Model 38 NB2_spON_AR1_form_ERxOpioidSES.Time

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

# Find the row for the combo

family.select = \NB2\  # Replace with \Poisson\, \NB1\, \NB2\
spatial.select = \on\      # Replace with \on\, \off\
spatiotemporla.select = \ar1\     # Replace with \off\, \iid\, \ar1\
form.select = \form_ERxOpioidSES.Time\                  #\form\,  \form.er\,  \form.er.cov\,  \form.inter.cov\,   \form.er.spline\,  \form.er.cov.spline\,  \form.inter.cov.spline\



idx <- with(aic_table, which(family == family.select & 
                               spatial == spatial.select & 
                               spatiotemporal == spatiotemporla.select &
                               form == form.select))

stopifnot(length(idx) == 1)          # ensure it exists uniquely
fit <- fits[[idx]]      # create the named object you expected

summary(fit)

```r
```r
# Find the row for the combo

family.select = \NB2\  # Replace with \Poisson\, \NB1\, \NB2\
spatial.select = \on\      # Replace with \on\, \off\
spatiotemporla.select = \ar1\     # Replace with \off\, \iid\, \ar1\
form.select = \form_ERxOpioidSES.Time\                  #\form\,  \form.er\,  \form.er.cov\,  \form.inter.cov\,   \form.er.spline\,  \form.er.cov.spline\,  \form.inter.cov.spline\



idx <- with(aic_table, which(family == family.select & 
                               spatial == spatial.select & 
                               spatiotemporal == spatiotemporla.select &
                               form == form.select))

stopifnot(length(idx) == 1)          # ensure it exists uniquely
fit <- fits[[idx]]      # create the named object you expected

summary(fit)
```
```

Spatial model fit by ML [‘sdmTMB’] Formula: form_obj Mesh: mesh (isotropic covariance) Time column: time_arg Data: df Family: poisson(link = ‘log’)

Conditional model: coef.est coef.se (Intercept) -9.82 0.28 ER_annual_percapita_z -0.20 0.09 OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z 0.14 0.19 HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z -0.22 0.21 BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z 0.40 0.11 METHADONE_annual_percapita_z 0.11 0.15

Matérn range: 92.34 Spatial SD: 0.51 ML criterion at convergence: 197.433

See ?tidy.sdmTMB to extract these values as a data frame.

sanity(fit)




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZR0JnY2x4dWMyRnVhWFI1S0dacGRDbGNibHh1WUdCZ1hHNWdZR0FpZlE9PSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuYGBgclxuc2FuaXR5KGZpdClcblxuYGBgXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuc2FuaXR5KGZpdClcblxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
sanity(fit)

```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



Model 29 Poisson_spON_OFF_form_ERxOpioidSES.Time (AIC = 417.5) ***
Model 32 Poisson_spON_OFF_form_ERxOpioidSES.Time (AIC = 419.5)
Model 38 NB2_spON_AR1_form_ERxOpioidSES.Time (AIC = 423.5) 

Model 29 Poisson_spON_OFF_form_ERxOpioidSES.Time (AIC = 417.5)
A spatial Poisson regression with a linear temporal trend and ER × opioid × SES interactions was selected as the primary model based on AIC, diagnostic plots, and convergence criteria. More complex negative binomial and spatiotemporal models provided identical fixed-effect estimates but showed unnecessary overparameterization.

Model 38 NB2_spON_AR1_form_ERxOpioidSES.Time (AIC = 423.5) [robustness check]
We fit a negative binomial spatiotemporal model with spatial random effects and AR1 correlation. The estimated dispersion parameter was extremely large and the spatiotemporal variance collapsed to ≈0, indicating that a simpler spatial Poisson model provided an adequate fit. Results were virtually identical under both specifications; we report the spatial model with linear time and ER×opioid×SES interactions.



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

mname <- aic_table_coef$model[which.min(aic_table_coef$AIC)]
fit   <- fits[[mname]]

set.seed(123)
sims <- simulate(fit, nsim = 250, type = \mle-mvn\)

# Option 1: get DHARMa object directly
dh <- sdmTMB::dharma_residuals(
  simulated_response = sims,
  object             = fit,
  plot               = FALSE,
  return_DHARMa      = TRUE
)

plot(dh)                         # DHARMa default diagnostic plot



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxubW5hbWUgPC0gYWljX3RhYmxlX2NvZWYkbW9kZWxbd2hpY2gubWluKGFpY190YWJsZV9jb2VmJEFJQyldXG5maXQgICA8LSBmaXRzW1ttbmFtZV1dXG5cbnNldC5zZWVkKDEyMylcbnNpbXMgPC0gc2ltdWxhdGUoZml0LCBuc2ltID0gMjUwLCB0eXBlID0gXFxtbGUtbXZuXFwpXG5cbiMgT3B0aW9uIDE6IGdldCBESEFSTWEgb2JqZWN0IGRpcmVjdGx5XG5kaCA8LSBzZG1UTUI6OmRoYXJtYV9yZXNpZHVhbHMoXG4gIHNpbXVsYXRlZF9yZXNwb25zZSA9IHNpbXMsXG4gIG9iamVjdCAgICAgICAgICAgICA9IGZpdCxcbiAgcGxvdCAgICAgICAgICAgICAgID0gRkFMU0UsXG4gIHJldHVybl9ESEFSTWEgICAgICA9IFRSVUVcbilcblxucGxvdChkaCkgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgIyBESEFSTWEgZGVmYXVsdCBkaWFnbm9zdGljIHBsb3RcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
mname <- aic_table_coef$model[which.min(aic_table_coef$AIC)]
fit   <- fits[[mname]]

set.seed(123)
sims <- simulate(fit, nsim = 250, type = \mle-mvn\)

# Option 1: get DHARMa object directly
dh <- sdmTMB::dharma_residuals(
  simulated_response = sims,
  object             = fit,
  plot               = FALSE,
  return_DHARMa      = TRUE
)

plot(dh)                         # DHARMa default diagnostic plot
```
```

    DHARMa nonparametric dispersion test via sd of residuals fitted vs. simulated

alternative hypothesis: two.sided

## 6. ER and others

YXBpdGFfeiArXG4gICAgICB1bmVtcGxveWVlX3JhdGVfeiArIGdpbmlfaW5kZXhfeiArXG4gICAgICBwb3ZlcnR5X3JhdGVfeiArIGRpc2FiaWxpdHlfcmF0ZV96ICsgbm9pbnN1cmFuY2VfcmF0ZV96XG4gICAgKSArXG4gICAgdGltZV9pbmRleFxuKVxuXG4jIyAtLS0gRk9STSBMSVNUIChubyBkdXBsaWNhdGVzLCBhbGwgZGVmaW5lZCBhYm92ZSkgLS0tLS0tLS0tLS0tLVxuXG5mb3JtX29wdHNfRVIgPC0gYyhcbiAgXCJmb3JtX0FsbFwiLFxuICBcImZvcm1fVVJjb2RlXCIsXG4gIFwiZm9ybV9VUmNvZGUuT3Bpb2lkXCIsXG4gIFwiZm9ybV9VUmNvZGUuU0VTXCIsXG4gIFwiZm9ybV9VUmNvZGUuVGltZVwiLFxuICBcImZvcm1fVVJjb2RlLlNwbGluZVwiLFxuICBcImZvcm1fVVJjb2RleFRpbWVcIixcbiAgXCJmb3JtX1VSY29kZS5TRVMuU3BsaW5lXCIsXG4gIFwiZm9ybV9VUmNvZGV4T3Bpb2lkLlNFU1wiLFxuICBcImZvcm1fVVJjb2RleFNFUy5PcGlvaWRcIixcbiAgXCJmb3JtX1VSY29kZXhPcGlvaWRTRVMuU3BsaW5lXCIsXG4gIFwiZm9ybV9VUmNvZGV4T3Bpb2lkU0VTLlRpbWVcIlxuKVxuXG5cbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r

## Full main-effects model (ER . opioids . SES)
form_All <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~ URcode + #ER_annual_percapita_z
    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
    METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
)

## ER only
form_URcode <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~ URcode
)

## ER . Opioids (additive)
form_URcode.Opioid <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~ URcode +
    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
    METHADONE_annual_percapita_z
)


## ER . SES (additive)
form_URcode.SES <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~ URcode +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
)

## ER . Time (additive linear)
form_URcode.Time <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~ URcode + time_index
)

## ER . SplineTime (additive nonlinear)
form_URcode.Spline <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~ URcode + s(time_index, k = 4)
)

## ER x Time (interaction)
form_URcodexTime <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~ URcode * time_index
)

## ER . SES . SplineTime (additive, no interaction)
form_URcode.SES.Spline <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~ URcode +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z +
    s(time_index, k = 4)
)

## ER x Opioid . SES (ER interacts with opioids; SES additive)
form_URcodexOpioid.SES <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~
    URcode * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z
    ) +
    unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
    poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
)

## ER x SES . Opioid (ER interacts with SES; opioids additive)
form_URcodexSES.Opioid <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~
    URcode * (
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
    BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
    METHADONE_annual_percapita_z
)

## ER x (Opioid + SES) . Spline (maximal interaction)
form_URcodexOpioidSES.Spline <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~
    URcode * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    s(time_index, k = 4)
)

## ER x (Opioid + SES) . Time (maximal interaction + linear trend)
form_URcodexOpioidSES.Time <- as.formula(
  ER_annual ~
    URcode * (
      OXYCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita_z +
      BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita_z +
      METHADONE_annual_percapita_z +
      unemployee_rate_z + gini_index_z +
      poverty_rate_z + disability_rate_z + noinsurance_rate_z
    ) +
    time_index
)

## --- FORM LIST (no duplicates, all defined above) -------------

form_opts_ER <- c(
  "form_All",
  "form_URcode",
  "form_URcode.Opioid",
  "form_URcode.SES",
  "form_URcode.Time",
  "form_URcode.Spline",
  "form_URcodexTime",
  "form_URcode.SES.Spline",
  "form_URcodexOpioid.SES",
  "form_URcodexSES.Opioid",
  "form_URcodexOpioidSES.Spline",
  "form_URcodexOpioidSES.Time"
)

```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->





#### 6.2 ER Model Comparison and Curvature Testing


<!-- rnb-text-end -->

-->

```r
# ---------- helper: fit with warning capture ----------
fit_with_warnings <- function(expr) {
  warns <- character(0)
  res <- withCallingHandlers(
    try(expr, silent = TRUE),
    warning = function(w) {
      warns <<- c(warns, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )
  list(result = res, warnings = warns)
}

# ---------- grids ----------
families <- list(
  NB2     = nbinom2(link = "log"),
  Poisson = poisson(link = "log")
)
spatial_opts <- c("off","on")
st_opts      <- c("off","ar1") # "iid" if you want it





fits_ER <- list()
rows <- list()
i <- 1

for (fam_name in names(families)) {
  fam <- families[[fam_name]]
  for (sp in spatial_opts) {
    for (st in st_opts) {
      for (form in form_opts_ER) {

        # confirm the formula object exists and fetch it
        if (!exists(form, inherits = TRUE)) {
          warning(sprintf("Formula object '%s' not found; skipping.", form))
          next
        }
        form_obj <- get(form, inherits = TRUE)
        form_opts_ER[!vapply(form_opts_ER, exists, logical(1), inherits = TRUE)]
        # Should return character(0)

        # time index only when spatiotemporal != "off"
        time_arg <- if (st == "off") NULL else "time_index"

        # include form name in model label (and avoid sprintf mismatch)
        model_name <- paste0(
          fam_name, "_",
          "sp", toupper(sp), "_",
          toupper(st), "_",
          form
        )

        cat("Fitting:", model_name, "\n")

        res <- fit_with_warnings(
          sdmTMB(
            formula = form_obj,
            data = df,
            mesh = mesh,
            family = fam,
            spatial = sp,
            spatiotemporal = st,
            time = time_arg,
            offset = df$log_pop,
            control = sdmTMBcontrol(newton_loops = 3)
          )
        )

        if (!inherits(res$result, "try-error")) {
          fit_i <- res$result
          fits_ER[[model_name]] <- fit_i

          # --- diagnostics ---
          pd <- tryCatch(isTRUE(fit_i$sd_report$pdHess), error = function(e) NA)
          grad_max <- tryCatch({
            g <- fit_i$sd_report$gradient.fixed
            if (is.null(g) || length(g) == 0) NA_real_ else suppressWarnings(max(abs(g), na.rm = TRUE))
          }, error = function(e) NA_real_)
          warn_txt <- paste(unique(res$warnings), collapse = " | ")
          warn_hessian <- grepl("Hessian", warn_txt, ignore.case = TRUE)
          warn_nan     <- grepl("NaN", warn_txt, ignore.case = TRUE)

          rows[[i]] <- tibble::tibble(
            model = model_name,
            family = fam_name,
            spatial = sp,
            spatiotemporal = st,
            form = form,
            AIC = tryCatch(AIC(fit_i), error = function(e) NA_real_),
            logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit_i)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
            npar = tryCatch(attr(logLik(fit_i), "df"), error = function(e) NA_integer_),
            hessian_pd = pd,
            grad_max = grad_max,
            converged_strict = isTRUE(pd) && is.finite(grad_max) && grad_max < 1e-3,
            n_warnings = length(res$warnings),
            warn_hessian = warn_hessian,
            warn_nan = warn_nan,
            first_warning = if (length(res$warnings)) res$warnings[[1]] else NA_character_
          )
        } else {
          rows[[i]] <- tibble::tibble(
            model = model_name,
            family = fam_name,
            spatial = sp,
            spatiotemporal = st,
            form = form,
            AIC = NA_real_, logLik = NA_real_, npar = NA_integer_,
            hessian_pd = NA, grad_max = NA_real_, converged_strict = FALSE,
            n_warnings = length(res$warnings),
            warn_hessian = grepl("Hessian", paste(res$warnings, collapse=" | "), ignore.case = TRUE),
            warn_nan = grepl("NaN", paste(res$warnings, collapse=" | "), ignore.case = TRUE),
            first_warning = if (length(res$warnings)) res$warnings[[1]] else NA_character_
          )
        }

        i <- i + 1
      }
    }
  }
}



aic_table_ER <- bind_rows(rows) %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  mutate(DeltaAIC = AIC - min(AIC, na.rm = TRUE))

#print(aic_table, n = nrow(aic_table))

datatable(
  aic_table_ER,
  filter = "top", 
  options = list(
    pageLength = 50,
    autoWidth = TRUE
  )
)



summary(df$ER_annual_percapita_z)
any(df$ER_annual_percapita_z < 0)



#write.csv(aic_table, "output/aic_table.csv", row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(fits_ER, "../Shiny/fits_ER.rds")

```

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->

```r
# --- extract coefficient info for ER_annual_percapita_z ---
coef_info <- lapply(names(fits), function(mname) {
  fit_i <- fits[[mname]]
  if (inherits(fit_i, "sdmTMB")) {
    td <- tryCatch(broom::tidy(fit_i), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(td) && "term" %in% names(td)) {

      
      
      row <- td[td$term == "ER_annual_percapita_z", c("term", "estimate", "std.error"), drop = FALSE]
      # row <- td[td$term == "ER_annual_percapita_z", c("term", "estimate", "std.error"), drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(row) == 1) {
        return(tibble(
          model = mname,
          coef_est = round(row$estimate,3),
          coef_se = round(row$std.error,3)
        ))
      }
    }
  }
  tibble(model = mname, coef_est = NA_real_, coef_se = NA_real_)
})

coef_df_ER <- bind_rows(coef_info)

# --- join back to AIC table ---
aic_table_coef_ER <- aic_table_ER %>%
  left_join(coef_df, by = "model")

# view top models
#print(aic_table_coef %>% select(model, AIC, DeltaAIC, coef_est, coef_se))

datatable(
  aic_table_coef_ER,
  filter = "top", 
  options = list(
    pageLength = 50,
    autoWidth = TRUE
  )
)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

saveRDS(aic_table_coef_ER, "../Shiny/aic_table_coef_ER.rds")

  df,
  fits_ER,
  aic_table_coef_ER,
  file = "../Shiny/models_ER.RData"
)

## 6 PCA Method [New]
### 6.1 Build composite indices (PCA)

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

bn1cblxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->

# ---- choose variables ----
opioid_vars <- c(\OXYCODONE_annual_percapita\,
                 \HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita\,
                 \BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita\,
                 \METHADONE_annual_percapita\)

ses_vars <- c(\poverty_rate\, \disability_rate\, \noinsurance_rate\,
              \unemployee_rate\, \gini_index\)

# Ensure numeric and drop rows with all-NA in a block
X_opioid <- df %>% select(all_of(opioid_vars)) %>% mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))
X_ses    <- df %>% select(all_of(ses_vars))    %>% mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

# ---- PCA (columns standardized automatically with scale.=TRUE) ----
pca_opioid <- prcomp(na.omit(X_opioid), scale. = TRUE)
pca_ses    <- prcomp(na.omit(X_ses),    scale. = TRUE)

# helper to project with NA handling
project_pc1 <- function(X, pca){
  # center/scale with training means/sds from prcomp
  Xcs <- sweep(X, 2, pca$center, \-\)
  Xcs <- sweep(Xcs, 2, pca$scale,  \/\)
  # PC1 scores (first loading vector)
  as.numeric(as.matrix(Xcs) %*% pca$rotation[,1])
}

# add indices to df (aligned by row order; if NA rows exist, PC1 will be NA)
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Opioid_Index   = project_pc1(select(., all_of(opioid_vars)), pca_opioid),
    SES_Index      = project_pc1(select(., all_of(ses_vars)),    pca_ses)
  ) %>%
  # z-standardize indices for interpretability
  mutate(
    Opioid_Index_z = as.numeric(scale(Opioid_Index)),
    SES_Index_z    = as.numeric(scale(SES_Index)),
    ER_annual_percapita_z = as.numeric(scale(ER_annual_percapita))
  )

# (optional) flip signs so “higher = worse” if desired
if (cor(df$Opioid_Index_z, df$OXYCODONE_annual_percapita, use=\pair\) < 0) {
  df$Opioid_Index_z <- -df$Opioid_Index_z
}
if (cor(df$SES_Index_z, df$poverty_rate, use=\pair\) < 0) {
  df$SES_Index_z <- -df$SES_Index_z
}




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

XG4gICAgU0VTX0luZGV4X3ogICAgPSBhcy5udW1lcmljKHNjYWxlKFNFU19JbmRleCkpLFxuICAgIEVSX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGFfeiA9IGFzLm51bWVyaWMoc2NhbGUoRVJfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YSkpXG4gIClcblxuIyAob3B0aW9uYWwpIGZsaXAgc2lnbnMgc28g4oCcaGlnaGVyID0gd29yc2XigJ0gaWYgZGVzaXJlZFxuaWYgKGNvcihkZiRPcGlvaWRfSW5kZXhfeiwgZGYkT1hZQ09ET05FX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGEsIHVzZT1cXHBhaXJcXCkgPCAwKSB7XG4gIGRmJE9waW9pZF9JbmRleF96IDwtIC1kZiRPcGlvaWRfSW5kZXhfelxufVxuaWYgKGNvcihkZiRTRVNfSW5kZXhfeiwgZGYkcG92ZXJ0eV9yYXRlLCB1c2U9XFxwYWlyXFwpIDwgMCkge1xuICBkZiRTRVNfSW5kZXhfeiA8LSAtZGYkU0VTX0luZGV4X3pcbn1cblxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
# ---- choose variables ----
opioid_vars <- c(\OXYCODONE_annual_percapita\,
                 \HYDROCODONE_annual_percapita\,
                 \BUPRENORPHINE_annual_percapita\,
                 \METHADONE_annual_percapita\)

ses_vars <- c(\poverty_rate\, \disability_rate\, \noinsurance_rate\,
              \unemployee_rate\, \gini_index\)

# Ensure numeric and drop rows with all-NA in a block
X_opioid <- df %>% select(all_of(opioid_vars)) %>% mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))
X_ses    <- df %>% select(all_of(ses_vars))    %>% mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

# ---- PCA (columns standardized automatically with scale.=TRUE) ----
pca_opioid <- prcomp(na.omit(X_opioid), scale. = TRUE)
pca_ses    <- prcomp(na.omit(X_ses),    scale. = TRUE)

# helper to project with NA handling
project_pc1 <- function(X, pca){
  # center/scale with training means/sds from prcomp
  Xcs <- sweep(X, 2, pca$center, \-\)
  Xcs <- sweep(Xcs, 2, pca$scale,  \/\)
  # PC1 scores (first loading vector)
  as.numeric(as.matrix(Xcs) %*% pca$rotation[,1])
}

# add indices to df (aligned by row order; if NA rows exist, PC1 will be NA)
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Opioid_Index   = project_pc1(select(., all_of(opioid_vars)), pca_opioid),
    SES_Index      = project_pc1(select(., all_of(ses_vars)),    pca_ses)
  ) %>%
  # z-standardize indices for interpretability
  mutate(
    Opioid_Index_z = as.numeric(scale(Opioid_Index)),
    SES_Index_z    = as.numeric(scale(SES_Index)),
    ER_annual_percapita_z = as.numeric(scale(ER_annual_percapita))
  )

# (optional) flip signs so “higher = worse” if desired
if (cor(df$Opioid_Index_z, df$OXYCODONE_annual_percapita, use=\pair\) < 0) {
  df$Opioid_Index_z <- -df$Opioid_Index_z
}
if (cor(df$SES_Index_z, df$poverty_rate, use=\pair\) < 0) {
  df$SES_Index_z <- -df$SES_Index_z
}

```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

#### 6.1.1 Dectect which varible is the most important

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVJeUJNYjJGa2FXNW5jeUFvZDJWcFoyaDBjeWtnWm05eUlGQkRNU0JwYmlCbFlXTm9JRkJEUVZ4dWNtOTFibVFvY0dOaFgyOXdhVzlwWkNSeWIzUmhkR2x2Ymxzc0lERXNJR1J5YjNBZ1BTQkdRVXhUUlYwc0lETXBYRzVnWUdBaWZRPT0gLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbiMgTG9hZGluZ3MgKHdlaWdodHMpIGZvciBQQzEgaW4gZWFjaCBQQ0FcbnJvdW5kKHBjYV9vcGlvaWQkcm90YXRpb25bLCAxLCBkcm9wID0gRkFMU0VdLCAzKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->

# Loadings (weights) for PC1 in each PCA
round(pca_opioid$rotation[, 1, drop = FALSE], 3)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZR0JnY2x4dUl5Qk1iMkZrYVc1bmN5QW9kMlZwWjJoMGN5a2dabTl5SUZCRE1TQnBiaUJsWVdOb0lGQkRRVnh1Y205MWJtUW9jR05oWDI5d2FXOXBaQ1J5YjNSaGRHbHZibHNzSURFc0lHUnliM0FnUFNCR1FVeFRSVjBzSURNcFhHNWdZR0JjYm1CZ1lDSjkgLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbmBgYHJcbiMgTG9hZGluZ3MgKHdlaWdodHMpIGZvciBQQzEgaW4gZWFjaCBQQ0FcbnJvdW5kKHBjYV9vcGlvaWQkcm90YXRpb25bLCAxLCBkcm9wID0gRkFMU0VdLCAzKVxuYGBgXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

```r
```r
# Loadings (weights) for PC1 in each PCA
round(pca_opioid$rotation[, 1, drop = FALSE], 3)
```
```

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



### 6.2 Fit a simpler NB2 model with the key interaction

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVYRzVtYjNKdFgyNWlJRHd0SUdGekxtWnZjbTExYkdFb1hHNGdJRVJsWVhSb2MxOWxiU0IrSUVWU1gyRnViblZoYkY5d1pYSmpZWEJwZEdGZmVpQXFJRTl3YVc5cFpGOUpibVJsZUY5NklDb2dVMFZUWDBsdVpHVjRYM29nS3lCNVpXRnlYRzRnSUNNZ1NXWWdlVzkxY2lCRVZpQnBjeUJoSUNweVlYUmxLam9nZFhObElFUmxZWFJvYzE5bGJWOXlZWFJsSUg0Z0xpNHVJQ2hoYm1RZ2NtVnRiM1psSUc5bVpuTmxkQ0JpWld4dmR5bGNiaWxjYmx4dVptbDBYMjVpSUR3dElITmtiVlJOUWloY2JpQWdabTl5YlhWc1lTQTlJR1p2Y20xZmJtSXNYRzRnSUdSaGRHRWdQU0JrWml4Y2JpQWdiV1Z6YUNBOUlHMWxjMmdzWEc0Z0lHWmhiV2xzZVNBOUlHNWlhVzV2YlRJb2JHbHVheUE5SUZ3aWJHOW5YQ0lwTEZ4dUlDQnpjR0YwYVdGc0lEMGdYQ0p2Ymx3aUxDQWdJQ0FnSUNBZ0lDQWdJQ01nYjNJZ1hDSnZabVpjSWlCcFppQjViM1VnY0hKbFptVnlYRzRnSUhOd1lYUnBiM1JsYlhCdmNtRnNJRDBnWENKaGNqRmNJaXdnSUNBZ0l5QjBjbmtnWENKaGNqRmNJaUJzWVhSbGNpQnBaaUJ1WldWa1pXUmNiaUFnZEdsdFpTQTlJRndpZEdsdFpWOXBibVJsZUZ3aUxDQWdJQ0FnSUNBZ0lDQWdJQ0FnSUNNZ2IzSWdYQ0owYVcxbFgybHVaR1Y0WENJZ2QyaGxiaUIxYzJsdVp5QnpjR0YwYVc5MFpXMXdiM0poYkNBaFBTQmNJbTltWmx3aVhHNGdJRzltWm5ObGRDQTlJR1JtSkd4dloxOXdiM0FzSUNBZ0lDQWdJQ01nUE9LQWxDQnJaV1Z3SUc5dWJIa2dhV1lnUkZZZ2FYTWdZU0FxWTI5MWJuUXFYRzRnSUdOdmJuUnliMndnUFNCelpHMVVUVUpqYjI1MGNtOXNLRzVsZDNSdmJsOXNiMjl3Y3lBOUlETXBYRzRwWEc1Y2JuTjFiVzFoY25rb1ptbDBYMjVpS1Z4dVlHQmdJbjA9IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5cbmZvcm1fbmIgPC0gYXMuZm9ybXVsYShcbiAgRGVhdGhzX2VtIH4gRVJfYW5udWFsX3BlcmNhcGl0YV96ICogT3Bpb2lkX0luZGV4X3ogKiBTRVNfSW5kZXhfeiArIHllYXJcbiAgIyBJZiB5b3VyIERWIGlzIGEgKnJhdGUqOiB1c2UgRGVhdGhzX2VtX3JhdGUgfiAuLi4gKGFuZCByZW1vdmUgb2Zmc2V0IGJlbG93KVxuKVxuXG5maXRfbmIgPC0gc2RtVE1CKFxuICBmb3JtdWxhID0gZm9ybV9uYixcbiAgZGF0YSA9IGRmLFxuICBtZXNoID0gbWVzaCxcbiAgZmFtaWx5ID0gbmJpbm9tMihsaW5rID0gXFxsb2dcXCksXG4gIHNwYXRpYWwgPSBcXG9uXFwsICAgICAgICAgICAgIyBvciBcXG9mZlxcIGlmIHlvdSBwcmVmZXJcbiAgc3BhdGlvdGVtcG9yYWwgPSBcXGFyMVxcLCAgICAjIHRyeSBcXGFyMVxcIGxhdGVyIGlmIG5lZWRlZFxuICB0aW1lID0gXFx0aW1lX2luZGV4XFwsICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgIyBvciBcXHRpbWVfaW5kZXhcXCB3aGVuIHVzaW5nIHNwYXRpb3RlbXBvcmFsICE9IFxcb2ZmXFxcbiAgb2Zmc2V0ID0gZGYkbG9nX3BvcCwgICAgICAgIyA84oCUIGtlZXAgb25seSBpZiBEViBpcyBhICpjb3VudCpcbiAgY29udHJvbCA9IHNkbVRNQmNvbnRyb2wobmV3dG9uX2xvb3BzID0gMylcbilcblxuc3VtbWFyeShmaXRfbmIpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


form_nb <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ ER_annual_percapita_z * Opioid_Index_z * SES_Index_z + year
  # If your DV is a *rate*: use Deaths_em_rate ~ ... (and remove offset below)
)

fit_nb <- sdmTMB(
  formula = form_nb,
  data = df,
  mesh = mesh,
  family = nbinom2(link = \log\),
  spatial = \on\,            # or \off\ if you prefer
  spatiotemporal = \ar1\,    # try \ar1\ later if needed
  time = \time_index\,               # or \time_index\ when using spatiotemporal != \off\
  offset = df$log_pop,       # <— keep only if DV is a *count*
  control = sdmTMBcontrol(newton_loops = 3)
)

summary(fit_nb)

-->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuXG5mb3JtX25iIDwtIGFzLmZvcm11bGEoXG4gIERlYXRoc19lbSB+IEVSX2FubnVhbF9wZXJjYXBpdGFfeiAqIE9waW9pZF9JbmRleF96ICogU0VTX0luZGV4X3ogKyB5ZWFyXG4gICMgSWYgeW91ciBEViBpcyBhICpyYXRlKjogdXNlIERlYXRoc19lbV9yYXRlIH4gLi4uIChhbmQgcmVtb3ZlIG9mZnNldCBiZWxvdylcbilcblxuZml0X25iIDwtIHNkbVRNQihcbiAgZm9ybXVsYSA9IGZvcm1fbmIsXG4gIGRhdGEgPSBkZixcbiAgbWVzaCA9IG1lc2gsXG4gIGZhbWlseSA9IG5iaW5vbTIobGluayA9IFxcbG9nXFwpLFxuICBzcGF0aWFsID0gXFxvblxcLCAgICAgICAgICAgICMgb3IgXFxvZmZcXCBpZiB5b3UgcHJlZmVyXG4gIHNwYXRpb3RlbXBvcmFsID0gXFxhcjFcXCwgICAgIyB0cnkgXFxhcjFcXCBsYXRlciBpZiBuZWVkZWRcbiAgdGltZSA9IFxcdGltZV9pbmRleFxcLCAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICMgb3IgXFx0aW1lX2luZGV4XFwgd2hlbiB1c2luZyBzcGF0aW90ZW1wb3JhbCAhPSBcXG9mZlxcXG4gIG9mZnNldCA9IGRmJGxvZ19wb3AsICAgICAgICMgPOKAlCBrZWVwIG9ubHkgaWYgRFYgaXMgYSAqY291bnQqXG4gIGNvbnRyb2wgPSBzZG1UTUJjb250cm9sKG5ld3Rvbl9sb29wcyA9IDMpXG4pXG5cbnN1bW1hcnkoZml0X25iKVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r

form_nb <- as.formula(
  Deaths_em ~ ER_annual_percapita_z * Opioid_Index_z * SES_Index_z + year
  # If your DV is a *rate*: use Deaths_em_rate ~ ... (and remove offset below)
)

fit_nb <- sdmTMB(
  formula = form_nb,
  data = df,
  mesh = mesh,
  family = nbinom2(link = \log\),
  spatial = \on\,            # or \off\ if you prefer
  spatiotemporal = \ar1\,    # try \ar1\ later if needed
  time = \time_index\,               # or \time_index\ when using spatiotemporal != \off\
  offset = df$log_pop,       # <— keep only if DV is a *count*
  control = sdmTMBcontrol(newton_loops = 3)
)

summary(fit_nb)
```
```

### 5.7 Two-part Hurdle [Under tuning]

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVJeUJwWkdWdWRHbG1lU0IyWVhKcFlXSnNaU0J3YjNOcGRHbHZibk1nWW5rZ2JtRnRaU0J3WVhSMFpYSnVYRzVrY25WblgybGtlQ0E4TFNCbmNtVndiQ2hjSWs5WVdVTlBSRTlPUlh4SVdVUlNUME5QUkU5T1JYeENWVkJTUlU1UFVsQklTVTVGZkUxRlZFaEJSRTlPUlZ3aUxDQllibUZ0WlhNc0lHbG5ibTl5WlM1allYTmxJRDBnVkZKVlJTbGNibHh1WUdCZ0luMD0gLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbiMgaWRlbnRpZnkgdmFyaWFibGUgcG9zaXRpb25zIGJ5IG5hbWUgcGF0dGVyblxuZHJ1Z19pZHggPC0gZ3JlcGwoXFxPWFlDT0RPTkV8SFlEUk9DT0RPTkV8QlVQUkVOT1JQSElORXxNRVRIQURPTkVcXCwgWG5hbWVzLCBpZ25vcmUuY2FzZSA9IFRSVUUpXG5cbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

# identify variable positions by name pattern

#### 5.7.1 Extract and Interpret Coefficients

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

dXRhdGUoXG4gICAgel92YWx1ZSA9IGVzdGltYXRlIC8gc3RkLmVycm9yLFxuICAgIHBfdmFsdWUgPSAyICogKDEgLSBwbm9ybShhYnMoel92YWx1ZSkpKSxcbiAgICBwX3ZhbHVlID0gY2FzZV93aGVuKFxuICAgICAgcF92YWx1ZSA8IDAuMDAxIH4gXFw8IC4wMDFcXCxcbiAgICAgIFRSVUUgICAgICAgICAgICB+IHNwcmludGYoXFwlLjNmXFwsIHJvdW5kKHBfdmFsdWUsIDMpKVxuICAgICksXG4gICAgZXhwX2VzdCA9IGV4cChlc3RpbWF0ZSksXG4gICAgZXhwX2xvICA9IGV4cChjb25mLmxvdyksXG4gICAgZXhwX2hpICA9IGV4cChjb25mLmhpZ2gpXG4gIClcblxuXG4jIEh1cmRsZTogWmVybyBNb2RlbCBQYXJ0XG50YWJfemVyb1xuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->

tab_zero <- tidy(fit_zero, effects = \fixed\, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    z_value = estimate / std.error,
    p_value = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z_value))),
    p_value = case_when(           # easy-read rounding
      p_value < 0.001 ~ \< .001\,
      TRUE            ~ sprintf(\%.3f\, round(p_value, 3))
    )
  )

tab_pos <- tidy(fit_pos, effects = \fixed\, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    z_value = estimate / std.error,
    p_value = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z_value))),
    p_value = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ \< .001\,
      TRUE            ~ sprintf(\%.3f\, round(p_value, 3))
    ),
    exp_est = exp(estimate),
    exp_lo  = exp(conf.low),
    exp_hi  = exp(conf.high)
  )


# Hurdle: Zero Model Part
tab_zero

```r
```r
tab_zero <- tidy(fit_zero, effects = \fixed\, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    z_value = estimate / std.error,
    p_value = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z_value))),
    p_value = case_when(           # easy-read rounding
      p_value < 0.001 ~ \< .001\,
      TRUE            ~ sprintf(\%.3f\, round(p_value, 3))
    )
  )

tab_pos <- tidy(fit_pos, effects = \fixed\, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    z_value = estimate / std.error,
    p_value = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z_value))),
    p_value = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ \< .001\,
      TRUE            ~ sprintf(\%.3f\, round(p_value, 3))
    ),
    exp_est = exp(estimate),
    exp_lo  = exp(conf.low),
    exp_hi  = exp(conf.high)
  )


# Hurdle: Zero Model Part
tab_zero
```
```

-->

# --- 1) Figure out which rows are usable for each part ---------------------
# Zero part needs RHS in form_zero
mf_zero  <- model.frame(form_zero, data = df)
keep_zero <- complete.cases(mf_zero)

# Positive part needs RHS in form_pos AND a finite offset
mf_pos   <- model.frame(form_pos,  data = df)
keep_pos <- complete.cases(mf_pos) & is.finite(df$log_pop)

# Rows where both parts can be predicted
keep_both <- keep_zero & keep_pos

# --- 2) Predict each part on the kept rows ---------------------------------
# Pr(Y>0 | x)
p_pos <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
p_pos[keep_zero] <- plogis(
  predict(fit_zero, type = \link\,
          newdata = df[keep_zero, , drop = FALSE],
          allow_new_levels = TRUE)$est
)

# E[Y | Y>0, x]
mu_pos <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
mu_pos[keep_pos] <- exp(
  predict(fit_pos, type = \link\,
          newdata = df[keep_pos, , drop = FALSE],
          offset  = df$log_pop[keep_pos],
          allow_new_levels = TRUE)$est
)

# --- 3) Combine into expected deaths and attach ----------------------------
E_Y <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
E_Y[keep_both] <- p_pos[keep_both] * mu_pos[keep_both]
df$E_Y <- E_Y

# --- 4) Plot observed vs expected on rows with both available --------------
ok <- is.finite(df$E_Y) & is.finite(df$Deaths_em)
plot(df$E_Y[ok], df$Deaths_em[ok], xlab = \Expected\, ylab = \Observed\)
abline(0, 1, col = \red\, lwd = 2)

# Optional quick diagnostics
cor(df$E_Y[ok], df$Deaths_em[ok])
hist((df$Deaths_em - df$E_Y)[ok], main = \Raw residuals\, xlab = \Obs - Exp\)




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->

```r
```r
# --- 1) Figure out which rows are usable for each part ---------------------
# Zero part needs RHS in form_zero
mf_zero  <- model.frame(form_zero, data = df)
keep_zero <- complete.cases(mf_zero)

# Positive part needs RHS in form_pos AND a finite offset
mf_pos   <- model.frame(form_pos,  data = df)
keep_pos <- complete.cases(mf_pos) & is.finite(df$log_pop)

# Rows where both parts can be predicted
keep_both <- keep_zero & keep_pos

# --- 2) Predict each part on the kept rows ---------------------------------
# Pr(Y>0 | x)
p_pos <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
p_pos[keep_zero] <- plogis(
  predict(fit_zero, type = \link\,
          newdata = df[keep_zero, , drop = FALSE],
          allow_new_levels = TRUE)$est
)

# E[Y | Y>0, x]
mu_pos <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
mu_pos[keep_pos] <- exp(
  predict(fit_pos, type = \link\,
          newdata = df[keep_pos, , drop = FALSE],
          offset  = df$log_pop[keep_pos],
          allow_new_levels = TRUE)$est
)

# --- 3) Combine into expected deaths and attach ----------------------------
E_Y <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
E_Y[keep_both] <- p_pos[keep_both] * mu_pos[keep_both]
df$E_Y <- E_Y

# --- 4) Plot observed vs expected on rows with both available --------------
ok <- is.finite(df$E_Y) & is.finite(df$Deaths_em)
plot(df$E_Y[ok], df$Deaths_em[ok], xlab = \Expected\, ylab = \Observed\)
abline(0, 1, col = \red\, lwd = 2)

# Optional quick diagnostics
cor(df$E_Y[ok], df$Deaths_em[ok])
hist((df$Deaths_em - df$E_Y)[ok], main = \Raw residuals\, xlab = \Obs - Exp\)

```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->




<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVaR1lrY21WemFXUWdQQzBnWkdZa1JHVmhkR2h6WDJWdElDMGdaR1lrUlY5WlhHNW9hWE4wS0dSbUpISmxjMmxrS1Z4dVltOTRjR3h2ZENoeVpYTnBaQ0IrSUhScGJXVmZhVzVrWlhnc0lHUmhkR0U5WkdZcFhHNWNibUJnWUNKOSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuZGYkcmVzaWQgPC0gZGYkRGVhdGhzX2VtIC0gZGYkRV9ZXG5oaXN0KGRmJHJlc2lkKVxuYm94cGxvdChyZXNpZCB+IHRpbWVfaW5kZXgsIGRhdGE9ZGYpXG5cbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

df$resid <- df$Deaths_em - df$E_Y
hist(df$resid)
boxplot(resid ~ time_index, data=df)

````

```r
df$resid <- df$Deaths_em - df$E_Y
hist(df$resid)
boxplot(resid ~ time_index, data=df)

```
